sharedRules: Content reusable across multiple prototype pages belongs in shared.
Business-specific text, fields, and state machines stay in the module directory.
dataRules: Use data files for declarative config, option lists, static demo rows, storage keys, and label maps.
Do not put querySelector, addEventListener, or DOM mutations in data files.
scriptRules: One script file should own one behavior capability.
Split page bootstrap, modal, drafts, search/filter, and bulk actions into separate files when present.
referenceRules: Document demo-only behavior separately from production intent.
Always include a production mapping aligned to domain, data, model, ui, and shared.
